basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Young Professional – International Outreach Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 32 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in International Relations / English / Mass Communication / Humanities or any related discipline; Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations / Public Policy / Communication / Development Studies / Foreign Languages; Minimum 3-5 years of experience.
qualification.details: Young Professional – International Outreach: Graduation in International Relations / English / Mass Communication / Humanities or any related discipline from a recognized university. Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations / Public Policy / Communication / Development Studies / Foreign Languages. Minimum 3-5 years of experience in international engagement, partnerships, outreach, or coordination roles in a government organization / international organization / embassy / reputed institution. Experience in working with foreign delegations, embassies, cultural institutions, or multilateral organizations. Strong skills in communication, documentation, drafting, and stakeholder coordination.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Young Professional – International Outreach Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the National Book Trust Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 20th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation degree in International Relations, English, Mass Communication, Humanities, or a related discipline. A Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations, Public Policy, Communication, Development Studies, or Foreign Languages is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 32 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for the Young Professional – International Outreach post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional – International Outreach position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the National Book Trust recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Book Trust, www.nbtindia.gov.in, and the direct link is provided in the Important Links section.
